detail.description: Will Wagner grounds out softly, pitcher Will Klein to first baseman Freddie Freeman.
Will Wagner pops out to third baseman Max Muncy.
Will Wagner singles on a ground ball to left fielder Tommy Edman.
Will Wagner lines out to center fielder Andy Pages.
Will Wagner grounds into a double play, first baseman Freddie Freeman to shortstop Mookie Betts to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Miguel Andujar out at 2nd. Will Wagner out at 1st.
Will Wagner grounds out, first baseman Freddie Freeman to pitcher Roki Sasaki.
Will Wagner grounds out, second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson.
Will Wagner grounds into a force out, shortstop Jorge Mateo to second baseman Ozzie Albies. Gavin Sheets to 3rd. Xander Bogaerts out at 2nd. Will Wagner to 1st.
Will Wagner singles on a line drive to center fielder Michael Harris II. Xander Bogaerts to 2nd.
Will Wagner doubles (1) on a line drive to center fielder Dane Myers.
Will Wagner singles on a fly ball to left fielder JJ Bleday. Manny Machado out at home on the throw, left fielder JJ Bleday to catcher P.J. Higgins.
Will Wagner grounds out, shortstop Matt McLain to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe.
Will Wagner singles on a line drive to center fielder Blake Dunn.
Will Wagner flies out to left fielder Lars Nootbaar.
Will Wagner singles on a ground ball to center fielder Nathan Church.
Will Wagner grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Xander Bogaerts out at 2nd. Will Wagner out at 1st.
Will Wagner grounds out, third baseman Blaze Jordan to first baseman Alec Burleson.
Will Wagner grounds out, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson.
Will Wagner grounds out, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson.
Will Wagner grounds out, third baseman Blaze Jordan to first baseman Alec Burleson.
Will Wagner grounds out, second baseman Nicky Lopez to first baseman Jake Burger.
Will Wagner grounds out, first baseman Jake Burger to pitcher Nathan Eovaldi. Manny Machado to 3rd. Gavin Sheets to 2nd.
Will Wagner flies out to shortstop Ezequiel Duran.
Will Wagner singles on a ground ball to center fielder Wyatt Langford, deflected by shortstop Nicky Lopez.
Will Wagner singles on a line drive to left fielder Alejandro Osuna.
Will Wagner reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Gunnar Henderson.
Will Wagner singles on a ground ball to left fielder Colton Cowser.
Will Wagner grounds out, second baseman Jackson Holliday to first baseman Pete Alonso.
